item.title: Motley Crue’s Abandoned Private Jet Only $64,500
item.description: A look at the listed jet tied to Motley Crue, with aviation details and a straightforward reaction to the price and presentation. What stands out most about this aircraft?

media:content.media:title: Motley Crue’s Abandoned Private Jet Only $64,500
media:content.media:description: A look at the listed jet tied to Motley Crue, with aviation details and a straightforward reaction to the price and presentation. What stands out most about this aircraft?

item.title: This Plane Breaks World Records Every Time it Flies
item.description: A look at a plane known for setting records every time it flies, with aviation commentary and a closer look at what makes it stand out. What do you think makes this aircraft so notable?

media:content.media:title: This Plane Breaks World Records Every Time it Flies
media:content.media:description: A look at a plane known for setting records every time it flies, with aviation commentary and a closer look at what makes it stand out. What do you think makes this aircraft so notable?

item.title: Race to the Sky: Building a Supersonic Plane
item.description: A look at the work behind building a supersonic plane, with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling around the process. What stands out most about this kind of aircraft?

media:content.media:title: Race to the Sky: Building a Supersonic Plane
media:content.media:description: A look at the work behind building a supersonic plane, with aviation-focused commentary and storytelling around the process. What stands out most about this kind of aircraft?

item.title: Flying the Most Complicated Airplane in GA
item.description: A look at flying one of the most complicated airplanes in general aviation, with real-life commentary and reactions along the way. The video focuses on the aircraft, the experience, and the story

media:content.media:title: Flying the Most Complicated Airplane in GA
media:content.media:description: A look at flying one of the most complicated airplanes in general aviation, with real-life commentary and reactions along the way. The video focuses on the aircraft, the experience, and the story
